redis_py.signature: arrinsert(name: str, path: str, index: int, *args: JsonType)

jedis.signature: long jsonArrInsert(String key, Path path, int index, Object... pojos)
List<Long> jsonArrInsert(String key, Path2 path, int index, Object... objects)

lettuce_sync.signature: List<Long> jsonArrinsert(K key, JsonPath jsonPath, int index, JsonValue... values)

params.name: key
params.description: the key holding the JSON document.

params.name: jsonPath
params.description: the JsonPath pointing to the array inside the document.

params.name: index
params.description: the index before which the new elements will be inserted.

returns.description: Long the resulting size of the arrays after the new data was inserted, or null if the path does not exist. @since 6.8

lettuce_sync.signature: List<Long> jsonArrinsert(K key, JsonPath jsonPath, int index, String... jsonStrings)

params.name: key
params.description: the key holding the JSON document.

params.name: jsonPath
params.description: the JsonPath pointing to the array inside the document.

params.name: index
params.description: the index before which the new elements will be inserted.

params.name: jsonStrings
params.description: one or more JSON strings to be inserted.

returns.description: Long the resulting size of the arrays after the new data was inserted, or null if the path does not exist. @since 6.8
